[2026-03-16 4:35 PM] kiksniko
Goals
Critically analyse and evaluate sociological theory
Apply theory to new modern social phenomaena

Select specific event which somehow relates to social policy: [insert event here]

Explore a sociological theory that can be used to analyze current event: [insert theory here]

Answer the question
HOW chosen theory can be used to analyse event in relation to social policy
WHY theory is appropriare for the task

Basically
Introduce theory, ensuring all concepts, theories, and ideas are defined and explained
Overview of current event. 
Define and explain the theory relating to the event
Draw an international perspective
